mapper.insert: IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM COM_MANUAL WHERE progid = #{progid}) BEGIN UPDATE COM_MANUAL SET content = #{content}, upd_dt = GETDATE(), upd_id = #{upd_id} WHERE progid = #{progid} END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO COM_MANUAL (progid, prognm, content, upd_dt, upd_id) VALUES (#{progid}, #{prognm}, #{content}, GETDATE(), #{upd_id}) END
